implementation_changes.summary: Preserve profile id, instance-layout evidence, mask-factory evidence, depth order, contact masks, occlusion layers, and merge-prevention checks in compiled Wave25 contracts.
Add stricter checks for source/target instance references, contact mask id, depth-order assertion, depth-order coverage, merge-prevention list type, and JSON validation report output.

errors: at least two character_instances are required
interaction_events must be a non-empty list

blocker.failed_condition: Current proven local layout has only one character instance and zero interaction events, while Wave25 requires at least two character instances plus source/target interaction event evidence.
blocker.next_unblock_action: Create or prove a true two-character instance layout with per-character masks/depth order and at least one contact/interaction event before rerunning Wave25 interaction validation.

boundary: This is an exact local Wave25 blocker, not a full project blocker. Continue with other local implementation/QA tasks until a true two-character layout and interaction event are available.
